hook.text: FA CUP HERO MACARI FINALLY GETS HIS MBE

beats.text: MACARI PLAYED FOR UNITED BETWEEN 1973 AND 1984
HIS DEFLECTED GOAL WON THE 1977 FA CUP
THE MACARI FOUNDATION HELPS HUNDREDS OF HOMELESS PEOPLE
KING CHARLES AWARDS THE LEGEND AN MBE AT 77

caption: Lou Macari, 77, has been awarded an MBE in King Charles's Birthday Honours — for services to football and his foundation's work fighting homelessness. 🔴 The Scottish legend scored the deflected winner in the 1977 FA Cup final against Liverpool. Long overdue. Which United legend deserves a royal honour next?
